behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names SFTConfig, ModelConfig, TrainerConfig, the VLM model names (Qwen/Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct, Qwen/Qwen3-VL-72B, Qwen/Qwen3.5-VL-7B), 'bfloat16' error match, and the expected pass/fail behavior for each config type.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and expected behavior without prescribing moving the validator from ModelConfig to TrainerConfig.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior (raises/does not raise) and an AST check that only forbids try/except in TrainerConfig validators — reasonable alternative fixes would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests instantiate configs, call validators, and run subprocesses; behavior is executed.

test_not_tautological.reason: Anti-stub test test_trainerconfig_vlm_rejects_non_bfloat16 ensures validator actually rejects float32 VLM, preventing a no-op stub.

behavior_in_tests.reason: SFT/ModelConfig success with defaults and TrainerConfig rejection with bfloat16 match in error are all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by section comments (Gates, pass_to_pass, fail_to_pass, anti-stub, config-derived).

no_typos.reason: Paths, class names, and model names appear consistent.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the constraint without naming specific file lines or the validator function.
